items.title: Statement on the US government directive to suspend access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5
items.original_summary: The US government has issued an export control directive to suspend all access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5.
items.chinese_summary: 跟进报道：Anthropic 再次确认因美国政府出口管制指令，全面暂停 Fable 5 与 Mythos 5 的 API 访问。相对此前公告无新增能力或例外，仅是政策执行层面的二次声明。所有调用 Fable 5、Mythos 5 模型名（含 aliased 名称）的 endpoint 立即返回不可用。
items.backend_focus: 立即行动：把生产环境中所有 model=fable-5、model=mythos-5 的调用切换到 Claude Opus 4.5 或 Sonnet 4.x；检查 fallback 路由中是否仍有指向这两个模型名的配置并删除。

items.title: Introducing Claude Tag Claude Tag is a new way for teams to work with Claude.
items.original_summary: Policy  Policy on the AI Exponential AI is advancing at exponential speed, and the policymaking process was built for a slower world. We’re sharing policy proposals to prepare our institutions for AI progress. Announcements  Introducing Claude Corps We’re launching Claude Corps, a national fellowship program for people early in their careers who are passionate about extending the benefits of AI to communities across America. Announcements  Expanding Project Glasswing We’re extending Project Glas...
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 发布 Claude Tag，定位为团队与 Claude 协作的新方式。属于产品功能类公告，文中提到「Product」分类但未给出具体 API 字段、SDK 接口或模型参数变化。基于命名推测与 Claude 协作/共享相关，可能影响团队管理接口。
items.backend_focus: 关注更新：建议在 Anthropic 官方文档中检索 Claude Tag 的具体 API/SDK 接入方式，确认是否需要更新 anthropic-sdk 版本；短期无破坏性变更，但应避免在生产中提前硬编码。

Announcements  Expanding Project Glasswing We’re extending Project Glasswing to approximately 150 new organizations in more than fifteen countries. Produ...
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 启动 Claude Corps 全国奖学金项目，面向早期职业者推广 AI 在美国各社区的应用。这是人才与品牌项目，不涉及模型版本、API 字段、SDK 变更。属于企业社会责任与雇主品牌内容。
items.backend_focus: 无。与工程无关，是人才招募与品牌项目，无需任何代码、API、SDK 调整。

items.title: Expanding Project Glasswing We’re extending Project Glasswing to approximately 150 new organizations in more than fifteen countries.
items.original_summary: Introducing Claude Tag Claude Tag is a new way for teams to work with Claude. Policy  Policy on the AI Exponential AI is advancing at exponential speed, and the policymaking process was built for a slower world. We’re sharing policy proposals to prepare our institutions for AI progress. Announcements  Introducing Claude Corps We’re launching Claude Corps, a national fellowship program for people early in their careers who are passionate about extending the benefits of AI to communities across Am...
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 扩展 Project Glasswing 至约 150 个新组织、覆盖 15 个以上国家。这是企业/政府 AI 部署的合作公告，不涉及新模型、API 字段、SDK 变更。对开发者调用方完全透明，接口签名与模型名不变。
items.backend_focus: 无需行动。是企业 AI 部署项目，不影响 Anthropic API、SDK、模型版本或定价；如服务部署在被列入 Glasswing 的组织环境中需关注数据合规策略。

items.title: Introducing Claude Opus 4.8 An upgrade to our Opus class of models, with stronger performance across coding, agentic tasks, and professional work, and the consi
items.original_summary: Introducing Claude Tag Claude Tag is a new way for teams to work with Claude. Policy  Policy on the AI Exponential AI is advancing at exponential speed, and the policymaking process was built for a slower world. We’re sharing policy proposals to prepare our institutions for AI progress. Announcements  Introducing Claude Corps We’re launching Claude Corps, a national fellowship program for people early in their careers who are passionate about extending the benefits of AI to communities across Am...
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 发布 Claude Opus 4.8，是 Opus 系列升级版本，在 coding、agentic 任务、专业工作负载上表现更强，并强调持续的 safety 对齐。相对 Claude Opus 4.5 属于同系列代际升级，预期 API 接口（messages、tools、system）兼容。具体 max_tokens、context window 需以官方 model card 为准。
items.backend_focus: 评估升级：把生产中 model=claude-opus-4-5 的调用切换到 claude-opus-4-8 进行 A/B 对比；重点验证长上下文、Tool Use、structured output（tool_choice）在 4.8 上的行为差异，确认 SDK 升级至最新 anthropic-sdk-python 即可。

items.title: Anthropic opens Seoul office and announces new partnerships across the Korean AI ecosystem
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 宣布首尔办公室开业并公布韩国 AI 生态的多项新合作。这是区域市场拓展与企业合作公告，无模型、API 或 SDK 变更，但意味着 Claude 在韩国的可用性与合规支持可能扩展。对调用方而言区域路由可能出现新选项。
items.backend_focus: 无需立即行动。区域合作不影响 API 接口、模型名、参数；若服务部署在韩国需关注 data residency 与 latency 路由配置，必要时启用区域 endpoint。

items.title: Results from the first Anthropic Public Record
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 发布首期 Anthropic Public Record 结果。这是公司层面的透明度与治理报告，分类为 Announcements，未涉及具体模型、API 字段、SDK 变更。属于公共披露内容，对工程实现无直接影响。
items.backend_focus: 无。与工程无关，是公司治理与透明度报告，无需任何代码、API、SDK 调整。

items.title: TCS and Anthropic partner to bring Claude to regulated industries
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 与 TCS 达成合作，将 Claude 引入受监管行业。这是企业渠道与合规合作公告，不涉及新模型、API 字段、SDK 变更。对一般开发者调用方透明，接口与模型名不变。
items.backend_focus: 无需行动。是企业渠道合作，不影响 Anthropic API、SDK、模型版本或定价；如服务属于受监管行业可关注后续合规相关 endpoint 更新。

items.title: DXC will integrate Claude into the systems banks, airlines, and other regulated industries rely on
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 与 DXC 达成合作，将 Claude 集成至银行、航空等受监管行业依赖的核心系统。这是企业渠道与垂直行业合作公告，不涉及新模型、API 字段、SDK 变更。对普通开发者调用方完全透明。
items.backend_focus: 无需行动。属于企业渠道合作，不影响 Anthropic API、SDK、模型版本或定价；无需任何代码改动。
